name: Rite Windows WedForm Submission List Recon

content.query:
SELECT distinct
cast(rtw.[Submission Time] as DATE) as SubmissionDate
,rtw.[Name]
,rtw.[Number]
,rtw.[Email]
,rtw.[Form Name]
 FROM [ODS].[WEB_RTW_FORM_SUBMISSION_LIST] rtw
 inner join 
 (
 SELECT distinct
crl.[Email]
 FROM [ODS].[WEB_RTW_FORM_SUBMISSION_LIST] crl
 left join [ODS].[LP_RTW_cst_Customers] cst
 on crl.Email = cst.Email
 WHERE
 cst.Email is null
 ) ccr_email
 on rtw.Email = ccr_email.Email
 order by 
 rtw.[Email] desc
